steps.data:
<?php
add_action('template_redirect', function () {
    if (empty($_GET['playground_demo'])) {
        return;
    }
    $post = get_page_by_path('playground-demo', OBJECT, 'post');
    if ($post) {
        wp_safe_redirect(get_permalink($post->ID));
        exit;
    }
    wp_safe_redirect(admin_url('post-new.php'));
    exit;
});

steps.code:
Hover or tap the numbered references in this paragraph to see static footnotes turn into elegant interactive popovers1. Littlefoot enhances the core Footnotes block automatically on the frontend2.

'."\n\n".''; $footnotes = array(array('content' => 'This popover is powered by the littlefoot.js library.', 'id' => $fn1), array('content' => 'Footnote references are scoped via the data-fn attribute.', 'id' => $fn2)); $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Littlefoot for Footnotes Demo', 'post_name' => 'playground-demo', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post', 'post_content' => $content)); update_post_meta($post_id, 'footnotes', wp_json_encode($footnotes));
